examples: They agonise over what went wrong and how to rekindle the flame.
No wonder parents agonise over what names to give their babies.
Parents also agonise about what they should do with their surplus frozen embryos.
It's funny, I say, because bands will agonise over the nuances of a recording, but perform gigs with less care.
Labour voters would not then have to agonise over whether to cast their votes for the deserving Mr Davies or to vote tactically for Mr Oaten.
